data.label: Deputy
data.description: Does the work, gets none of the credit.

data.label: Senior
data.description: Has opinions about tabs vs spaces. Will share them unsolicited.

data.label: Chief
data.description: Sends emails about other people's work. Calendar is 80% meetings.

data.label: Burnout
data.description: Has seen things. Mass Reply-All. The 3am pager. The failed migration.

data.label: Sublime
data.description: Transcended. Writes one-liners that terrify juniors. May or may not exist.
